t: Tom had 45 stickers and got 38 more. How many does he have in all?
There were 92 birds in a tree and 47 flew away. How many are left?
Sam has 67 cards and Ana has 85. How many more cards does Ana have?
What does the word "altogether" tell you to do?
Lily had 143 coins and gave away 68. How many coins does she have left?
There are 56 red apples and 78 green apples. How many apples are there in all?
There are 165 crayons and 78 are broken. How many good crayons are there?
What does the phrase "how many left" tell you to do?
There are 82 students in one class and 59 in another. How many students are there combined?
What is the first step when solving a word problem?
e: Always read the problem carefully first!

t: The park had 175 people and 89 left. How many people are still at the park?
What does the phrase "in all" mean in a math story?
e: "In all" is like "total" — it means ADD.

t: The store had 136 apples and sold 78. How many apples are left?
There are 63 boys and 74 girls at school. How many students are there altogether?
What does the word "difference" mean in a math problem?
Mia has 95 stickers and gives 47 away. How many stickers does she have left?
There are 74 pencils and 58 more pencils. How many are there altogether?
The school had 183 books and 96 were checked out. How many books are still there?
Which word tells you to SUBTRACT in a math story?
e: "Fewer" means less — SUBTRACT to find how many fewer.

t: There are 27 girls, 38 boys, and 15 teachers. How many people are there in all?
A book has 152 pages and Maria has read 67 pages. How many pages are left?
Sam scored 86 points and Ben scored 74 points. How many more points did Sam score?
Which word tells you to ADD in a math story?
There are 125 students and 46 more joined. How many students are there in all?
There are 200 apples and 87 were sold. How many apples are remaining?
Which word means SUBTRACT?
A bag had 134 grapes and 58 were eaten. How many grapes are left?
There are 43 red balloons and 59 blue balloons. How many balloons are there in all?
There were 175 people at a game and 88 left early. How many people are still at the game?
Jen had 95 cards, gave away 38, then got 27 more. How many cards does she have now?
